log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Satyr — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Satyr — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 38 damage. Satyr — Winged Striker HP: 29/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Satyr — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Satyr — Winged Striker HP: 16/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Satyr — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:6+6=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
